title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Microtek International South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microtek International South Asia Partners:
Microtek International South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International South Asia Partners!
